what_ran: WP-MET (§12.5) two-arm metered authoring-cost bench over the 20-source Euclid holdout, one run per arm, model claude-opus-4-8, harness wp-met/1.
what_this_is_NOT: This run does NOT execute the §13.2 transfer readout. The governed arm loaded NO frozen trained vocabulary -- BOTH arms mined from an empty table on the holdout, the prompt-vocabulary seam (admitted-operator registry digest 1f7bef3c...) is byte-identical between arms, and results/holdout_transfer.json was never produced. It licenses no transfer verdict, positive or negative.

confounds_named.cost_gap: 76% of the governed token numerator is ONE runaway agentic authoring session on h08_euclid_vii_def13_composite (1,044,942 input tokens). Excising h08 brings governed input (330k) to parity with ungoverned (382k). The '~9x cost' is ~3.8x inflated by one source; report the ratio as a logged number, never as 'governance costs 9x'.
confounds_named.coverage_gap: 3-vs-8 is driven by scattered LLM author-failures that struck DIFFERENT sources in each arm -- the same four wave-2 sources h17-h20 author-failed in governed yet ALL FOUR certified in ungoverned (opposite outcomes on identical sources = run-to-run nondeterminism, not source difficulty). The governed wave-2 wipeout follows the h08 runaway, consistent with rate-limit/ordering truncation. At n=1 run per arm with no variance estimate, 3-vs-8 is within noise.
confounds_named.raw_dl: 854 vs 689 is over UNEQUAL, non-overlapping parsed subsets of Euclid; DL is extensive, so the totals are apples-to-oranges and the failed governed_dl_le_ungoverned verdict is uninterpretable.

what_this_run_ESTABLISHES: The metered harness runs end-to-end: both arms metered from real usage metadata, clean per-arm out_dir isolation, FH7-exclusive denominator, verdict-demotion completing rather than crashing, holdout byte-inert.

The one clean, deterministic, LLM-free mechanism signal: a self-mined Euclid macro fails per-use reference-lowering certification on 5 of 7 invocations across the governed corpus -- weakly consistent with the C2 finding that the vocabulary's value/risk lives in certification structure, not compression.
what_this_run_does_NOT_establish: Anything about whether the trained vocabulary transfers to Euclid (UNTESTED -- no trained table was loaded).
Any governance effect on cost or coverage (confounded by h08 and author-failure noise, n=1).
to_execute_13_2_properly: The registered §13.2 equal-coverage repricing (frozen trained table digest ce5cb03fe2c5bdad vs empty table, on the SAME authored holdout readings, counting currency + adaptive-KT comparator, model bits excluded) plus a controlled retry/rate-limit policy and >=2 runs per arm for a variance estimate. Not done in this run.
process_note: This record replaces a WRONG first interpretation (that the vocabulary 'did not transfer and hurt authoring'). An adversarial analysis pass caught it before commit: no vocabulary was transferred, so the artifact cannot speak to transfer. The catch is the honesty discipline working -- and an Opus adversarial pass catching an Opus orchestrator's over-interpretation.
